titleStmt.title: SII 36.103: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 103. (A.R. No. 103 of 1910.) TIRUMĀḶAM (Kōviltirumāḷam), NANNILAM TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT. On the south wall of the first prākāra in the Māgāḷēśvara temple.

summary.p: The seven śiva-brāhmaṇas of Tirumāgāḷamuḍaiyār temple at Ambar in Ambar-nāḍu on receipt of seven kācus, gifted by Vīra Vichchādirap-Pallavaraiyaṉ, a native of Aṉṉiyūr in Kuṟukkai-nāḍu, a subdivision of Virudarājabhayaṅkara-vaḷanāḍu, agreed to maintain one perpetual lamp from the interest accured from the grant.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
[svastiśrī puka] ḻmātu viḷaṅka jayamātu virumpa nilamakaḷ vaḷara malarmakaḷ puṇara Urimayiṟ ciṟan=ta maṇimuṭicūṭi mīnavar nilai keṭa villavar kulaitara Enai mannavar Iriyaluṟṟiḻitarat tikkaṉaittum tan cakkaram naṭātti vīrasimhāsanattu Avani muḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum vīṟṟiruntaruḷiya kovirājakecaripaṉmarāṉa cakravattikaḷ
śrī kulottuṅkacoḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu nāṟpattu nālāvatu Uyyakkoṇṭār vaḷanāṭṭu Ampar nāṭṭu Ampar tirumākāḷamuṭaiyār koyilil civabrāhmaṇarom kāśyapan paṭṭan pālaicomanāna tillaināyaka paṭṭanum kāśyapan tillaiyāḷi kūttan kāśyapan ca vāṉa comanum kaśya
paṉ paṭṭan Āḷavantāṉum kāśyapaṉ paṭṭan kaṇavatiyum Āttiraiyaṉ Aṇukkaṉ Ānantaṉum Āttiraiyaṉ Aṉantaṉ Aravaṇaiyum kautumaṉ pālai pecaramaṉ maiṉtan Uḷḷiṭṭom virutarāyabhayaṅkara vaḷanāṭṭuk kuṟukkai nāṭṭu Aṉṉiyūr Aṉṉiyūruṭaiyāṉ viccātiraṉāṉa vīra viccātira
p pallavaraiyaṉukku nāṅkaḷ Upaiyap piramāṇañ ceytu kuṭutta paricāvatu Ivar pakkal Ivvāṇṭu nāṅkaḷ koṇṭa kācu Ēḻu Ik kāceḻum koṇṭum Uṭaiyār tiru mākāḷamuṭaiyārku Oru tirunuṉtāviḷakku cantirātittavaṟ śāśvatiyamāka Erikkak kaṭavomākavum nāṅkaḷum Eṅkaḷ va Ikkoyilil kuccikai Iṭa
it tirukkāppu nīkkināre Ittirununtāviḷakku Erikkak kaṭavitākavum Ipparicu cammatittu Ikkācu Ēḻum koṇṭu Itil palicai koṇṭu Ittirunuṉtāviḷakku Erikkakkaṭavomāka sammatittu piramāṇam paṇṇik kuṭuttom kāśyapaṉ paṭṭaṉ pālaicomanāna tillaināyaka paṭṭanum kāśyapaṉ tillaiyāḷi kūttaṉum kāśyapaṉ caṇṭeśva
Digital edition of SII 36.103 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
